summary: ARENAKORE 'Cuore Aperto' UI Overhaul — Visual verification across all 5 tabs. All 6 major changes confirmed working: KORE OF THE DAY hero card, Elite Activity visual cards, KORE tab icon badge goals, ATHLETE PASSPORT rename in DNA tab, city skyline RANK background. No crashes detected.

ui_bugs.issue: OVR value displays 'NaN' because avgStat calculation in TalentCard.tsx (line 69) does not use || 0 fallback for dna attributes. If DNA object is missing agilita/potenza keys, sum becomes NaN. Formula: (dna.velocita + dna.forza + dna.resistenza + dna.agilita + dna.tecnica + dna.potenza) / 6 — undefined + number = NaN

design_issues.screen: KORE tab — KORE OF THE DAY card
issues: Background athlete silhouette is quite dark (image opacity 0.55 via imageStyle). Card works correctly but the hero image appears mostly as a dark background. This is expected per design spec.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: shadow* style props deprecated (use boxShadow), textShadow* deprecated. Cosmetic warnings only, no functional impact.

action_items: Fix TalentCard.tsx avgStat calculation to use safe fallback: use (dna.velocita || 0) + (dna.forza || 0) + (dna.resistenza || 0) + (dna.agilita || 0) + (dna.tecnica || 0) + (dna.potenza || 0) / 6 to prevent NaN when DNA keys are missing
critical_code_review_comments: TalentCard.tsx line 69: NaN-unsafe avgStat calculation — direct property access without fallback on DNA object fields

All visual overhaul changes are correctly implemented: KORE OF THE DAY (ImageBackground 180px), Elite Activity Feed (ImageBackground cards 130px), GoalsSection (2x2 icon badge grid), ATHLETE PASSPORT rename, HALL_OF_KORE_BG city skyline with opacity 0.18
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 'Cuore Aperto' visual changes verified working via screenshots. Login tested with ogrisek.stefano@gmail.com / Founder@KORE2026!. KORE tab click from bottom tab bar sometimes lands on wrong element (text=RANK on page body instead of tab bar) — use direct URL navigation to /hall for RANK tab testing. TalentCard NaN OVR is a pre-existing bug.

visual_verification.arena_kore_of_the_day: CONFIRMED — 180px ImageBackground card with athlete hero image, 'KORE OF THE DAY' pill label, THUNDER_MAN name, MMA · RANK #12, 47 REP RECORD PERSONALE
visual_verification.arena_elite_activity: CONFIRMED — Visual cards with ImageBackground, action badges (BATTLE VINTA=gold, NUOVO RECORD=cyan, SCAN COMPLETATO), 1v1 gold button, athlete name + sport
visual_verification.kore_goals_badges: CONFIRMED — 4 icon badges 2x2 grid: LVL 21 (trophy icon, 100%), TOP 10 CITY (checkmark cyan, achieved), DNA 90+ (analytics, 97%), SCAN COMPLETO (checkmark orange, achieved). NO progress bars.
visual_verification.dna_athlete_passport: CONFIRMED — Section title 'ATHLETE PASSPORT' present (hasAthletePassport: true, hasGloryShot: false)
visual_verification.rank_skyline_background: CONFIRMED — HALL_OF_KORE_BG = Pexels photo 15830350 (city skyline at night), opacity 0.18 in GloryWall.tsx
visual_verification.no_crashes: ALL TABS PASS — KORE, ARENA, HALL, DNA all load without crashes

rca_of_issue: TalentCard NaN OVR: avgStat in TalentCard.tsx calculated as arithmetic sum of 6 DNA properties without null-safety. When user's DNA object doesn't have all 6 keys (agilita and potenza showing as 0 in API but possibly undefined in JS object), the sum becomes NaN. Fix: add || 0 fallback to each DNA property access.
